programme.title: Legend

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction...a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Hitler The Last Ten Days
programme.desc: Alec Guinness plays Adolf Hitler in this chilling dramatization of the last days of the Third Reich. Trapped in the Berlin bunker with his mistress and high command, Hitler comes apart...

programme.title: Clover Bend
programme.desc: An LA cop whose wife is killed in a shootout moves back to his hometown, trying to rebuild a life for himself and his children. Unbeknownst to him, his wife's killers are seeking revenge for one of their own who was also killed in the shootout.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lisa's return to her hometown to join the local police force coincides with the release of a man, Jake, who killed her best friend 15 years earlier. Soon, people start dying mysterious deaths and the investigation points to Jake as prime suspect.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: An Evil Queen enlists Rumpelstiltskin to help her send the Avengers Grimm back in time. The Avengers will need to work together if they are to return to the present and thwart the Queen before she can carry out her evil plan.

programme.title: Magical Adventures in the Forbidden City
programme.desc: In another world Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed years ago because of a disease. She takes us on a magical adventure, rising against the forces in command and shows how being brave and following your heart can show anything is possible.

programme.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
programme.desc: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations, a puppet called Pinocchio, magically comes to life. In order to become a real boy, Pinocchio must go on a daring adventure and learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E: A.R.C.H.I.E
programme.desc: Isabel has recently lost her parents in a car accident. Feeling alone and friendless, she befriends a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. who can talk, run at blinding speed and has super strength and x-ray vision and they become fast friends.

programme.title: Heaven Must Wait
programme.desc: An American inherits an old village church in England, where treasure is buried. Greedy Mr. Slee scents his opportunity to snatch the treasure. Diggity, a little cherub trying to earn his wings, helps uncover the treasure for the benefit of the village.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Frankenstein's Castle of Freaks
programme.desc: When a Neanderthal man is lynched by villagers, Count Frankenstein (Rossano Brazzi) uses his years of research to bring the monster back to life. (1984)

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room

programme.title: CSI: NY: Identity Crisis

programme.title: CSI: NY: Food For Thought

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team suspect that a woman's death might be the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Life Sentence
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac becomes part of a vendetta.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Exit Strategy

programme.title: CSI: NY: Indelible

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Clause

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body falls from the sky and the team discover it is from a commercial space flight.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backfire

programme.title: CSI: Miami: All Fall Down
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose, leaving his mark on the chests of his victims.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead, the evidence in both cases does not immediately prove a connection between the two deaths. However, as the CSIs dig deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a string of murders in Las Vegas that may be tied to an infamous mob boss from the 1970s who disappeared many years ago.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSIs process clues after a murder at a poultry manufacturing plant, the evidence leads them to the home of a man who collects miniature trains and other miniature paraphernalia.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: Wonder
programme.desc: Born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie Pullman becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade.

programme.title: LOL

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman

programme.title: The Magic Box
programme.desc: Biography of British film pioneer William Friese-Greene, who designed and patented a working cinematic camera at the expense of his domestic life. He was largely ignored by the commercial industry until the publication of a controversial biography.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Two couples, all car enthusiasts, challenge one another to a friendly race on the return from the annual London-to-Brighton veteran car rally. What starts out playfully becomes increasingly serious as they speed to the finish line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed and Greg's sons come for a ride along and disobey a direct order from Sergeant Parker when he tells them to remain in the truck while Team One deals with an incident between three cops on an off-the-books mission to clean up the streets.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is called in when an Emotionally Disturbed Person kidnaps his neighbor's baby, thinking it's his own daughter, and takes refuge on a ferry.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One faces the most challenging call of their careers when a series of bombs tears the city apart.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One continues the hunt for a bomber at large as team members, joined by EMS and the military, split up to deal with multiple bomb threats in a city already plunged into chaos.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a disturbed man takes a woman hostage outside an office building, the SRU is quick to respond to save the innocent hostage and bystanders caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Many horror legends along with Karloff and Lugosi have taken their turn playing sinister scientists and frightful physicians.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror

programme.desc: Matt's determined to get married and proposes to a Jewish girl on their first date.

programme.desc: Matt secretly elopes after one date with a girl from work, Sarah.

programme.desc: Annie and Eric have a disastrous Jewish dinner with Matt's "future" in-laws.

programme.desc: Mary returns to Buffalo to start a new career path as a flight attendant.

programme.desc: A cattle baron and a legendary frontiersman involve Marshal Matt Dillon in their life-and-death dispute over a hat.

programme.desc: Known as the smartest Haggen, Festus regrets the title when sought for advice by cousin Hard-Luck Henry Haggen.

programme.desc: Two recaptured Army deserters frame Festus Haggen in an attempted murder of their sergeant.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.desc: A distraught mother offers the town of Dry Rock $300,000 if it will clear her dead son's name of murder and robbery.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.desc: A pitchman's estranged wife agrees to help him raise money for the family of a drover who died while saving the pitchman's life.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Monica and Tess take jobs as party coordinators in order to help an orphaned boy and a wealthy family discover what's been missing in all of their lives

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues a ship returning from peace talks with the Magog.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Warts and All

programme.desc: Alex takes drastic action to lodge his marriage licence application in time.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sadness
programme.desc: A heartbreaking mystery begins with the discovery of a young woman's body floating in Washington state's Yakima River.

programme.title: On the Case: A Promise Kept
programme.desc: A cold-case detective reopens a decades-old murder case and promises to get justice on behalf of the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home. Was the killer also a guest at the celebration?

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of a Monster

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on a world where a powerful group can invade a person's dreams. With John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: In a chaotic world suffering from a scarcity of water, the Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) search for a hidden treasure.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn (Jerry O'Connell) is mistaken for a man with special powers when the Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) land on an Earth populated with dragons and castles.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn and Arturo (Jerry O'Connell, John Rhys-Davies) try to find a way of communicating with fire when the Sliders land on a world where the hot element has a mind of its own. With Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Remmy (Cleavant Derricks) finds himself with child when the Sliders land on a world where men carry babies for the last 20 weeks of gestation. With John Rhys-Davies.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Hakeem accepts a job as assistant manager of the Class Act claiming there are financial difficulties at home. Moesha, concerned about his college education, confronts his mother who denies his claims.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's sister Nicki (Leah Remini) shows up with some shocking news about her marriage. Phil and Eden consider bringing a guest into the bedroom.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Kevin Gets a Commercial Episode
programme.desc: Kevin's burgeoning career as a child actor has a negative fallout when a potential big break goes to his head. Ted Lange guest stars.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne's Surprise Party Episode
programme.desc: Nick secretly plans a surprise for Suzanne to help her overcome a traumatic childhood experience.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mother's Day Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne and Marilyn convene for a spa weekend for Mother's Day, but friction soon mounts between the two.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Goes Vegan Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey decides to take on a vegan diet and lifestyle, but she may have ulterior motives in doing so.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Staycation Episode
programme.desc: Nick tries to give his family the best vacation ever but things do not go well at all.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Thief Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey steals sixty dollars from Gigi's wallet and turns back around and blames Kevin for it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Bad Dream Episode
programme.desc: Kevin and Nick goes to an R-rated movie, but Kevin has nightmares from seeing it.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The 22 Episode
programme.desc: The family oversleeps on the day Lindsey is scheduled to sing the national anthem at a baseball game. Meanwhile, Kevin gets sick.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Cooking Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne go head to head in the kitchen when Nick says cooking is \\"easy\\" and Suzanne challenges him to a family cooking competition.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair
programme.desc: On June 30, 2014, in Nancy, the police are called to the home of Julie Martin, a 34-year-old nurse.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Deadline
programme.desc: Allan comes to Sydney, telling he has 12 hours before a Necron virus kills him unless he delivers Tau to a blackmailer who has the antidote.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Wages of Sydney
programme.desc: Quan Shu, Manchuria 1359 BC: The Chinese invent an explosive gift egg. New York, 2001: A rival beats Sydney and Nigel to a map leading to the Dragon's Egg.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Vampire's Kiss

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney runs into her ex Gray and goes on a holiday with him to Bali, but when Derek Lloyd shows up to enlist her to find Parvati's Bowl, she can't resist.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydney's roommate from school is on track of a pendant from her past and enlists Sydney to help find it and catch the killer.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe and Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock aim to unearth the next Tonton Zola Moukoko as they play Football Manager - and four other titles - on the witty video game show.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Matt Forde hopes to remain 'Unspun' as he and Jessica Knappett race each other on Need for Speed. Other classic titles on Dara's consoles-and-comedy show include The Sims.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: DJ Dev and comic Susan Calman do battle on five titles, including Minecraft and Batman - Arkham Asylum.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: The gloriously geeky game show in which celebs duel on consoles. Jonathan Ross and Suzi Ruffell play a mix of retro and modern games, including Final Fight and Titanfall 2.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Anna Richardson and Nish Kumar grab a D-pad and duel on five classic and contemporary titles, including Virtua Fighter and Worms Armageddon.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Liza Tarbuck and Jamali Maddix join Dara and the team captains to take part in a five-round gaming challenge featuring titles including `Crash Bandicoot', `Far Cry 3' and `Bomb Jack'.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens

programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole

programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Democracy without Democrats 1929-1933

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Racial State 1933-1934

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Hidden in Plain Sight 1935-1938

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Up in Flames 1936-1940
programme.desc: Up in Flames 1936-1940: At the end of 1939, the German Army invades Poland. Examine how Hitler succeeded in pushing through his rearmament and war plans relatively unhindered.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood
programme.desc: It's the first day of the new Bluefin tuna fishing season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and every captain in the fleet wants to the land the coveted first tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wardens: Fun in The Sun
programme.desc: When Jet skies get too close to boats things can turn dangerous. And Warden Bryan Golie questions an angler in search for the truth.

programme.title: Wardens: Above & Beyond
programme.desc: Wardens often go the extra mile to investigate a report of illegal activity, help a hunter or protect landowner rights. This week Wardens go that extra mile with an unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Wardens: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: In 2012 The small community of Whitefish Montana was shocked by the useless killing of over 20 deer. Region 1 Wardens think outside the box to put a stop to this heinous crime.

programme.title: Wardens: Invasive Species
programme.desc: Protecting Montana Waters from Aquatic Invasive Species is a top priority for Montana FWP. But when AIS check stations are set up in Region 1 and 3 it's up to the Wardens to educate the public.

programme.title: Wardens: Axel and Chains
programme.desc: When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle. And we pay tribute to an honorary warden that will truly be missed.

programme.title: Wardens: Stolen Future
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens have their hands full with headless deer, trophy bull elk being poached and illegally tagged deer. But the Future of hunting is bright with a new batch of hunters.

programme.title: Wardens: Night Chase
programme.desc: With a massive Winter storm bearing down on Northern Montana Wardens aren't backing off. Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station while miles away they chase down a decoy shooter that refuses to give up.

programme.title: Wardens: Wasted Dummy
programme.desc: This week Warden Lesofski searches out a hunting party that left their elk to rot. While Region 2 Wardens rush into a volatile situation after their decoy is shot from the road.

programme.title: Wardens: Minor Mistakes
programme.desc: A riverside check station catches four minors with no life jackets and a lot of alcohol. Then Warden Golie stops two car full of minors that should not be behind the wheel.

programme.title: Wardens: True Lies
programme.desc: A check station outside of Billings stops a guy who refuses to tell the truth. Investigating who shot the deer reveals a long history of game violations.

programme.title: Wardens: Head Case
programme.desc: Someone shot and stashed the head of a trophy bull elk. Wardens spend months staking out the head. Once it is moved they use high tech equipment to locate the head and capture the suspect.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: A Field Full of Secrets
programme.desc: In 2008, two best friends stepped into their very first crop circle in southern England. This is story of what happened next.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch removes model Kelly's lower-back tattoo. Alice tackles Laim's DIY tattoo disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Glen rids Alex of his hero-worshipping howler, while Sketch tames Aaron's little monster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness catches up with her. Gary takes Aaron "Dad training" and Sophie receives some devastating news. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron gets called out at an MMA fight. Marnie is finally ready to have visitors and Holly and Jacob throw an epic engagement party. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron takes up golf with hilarious results. Sophie makes a life changing purchase. Holly has a fitness photo shoot and Marnie & Casey have their first date since Rox's birth. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly prepares to meet one of her trolls. Gary and Emma's second baby arrives early. Sophie shows off her new house and Marnie & Casey fall out at the pool. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron welcomes his son into the world, but there's some bad news for his relationship. Holly takes a trip to secure a wedding venue and Marnie sees her mum for the first time since lockdown. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slugfight / Izomborg
programme.desc: The campers must travel back in time to prevent Grandpappy Black Butt from stealing the deed.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Plantbottom / Game Over
programme.desc: It's Suzi's birthday and McGee ate her gift!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pod Parents / Zombie Scouts
programme.desc: Suzi, desperate to get McGee sent home, invites her parents for a visit to Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: High Plains Garbage Eater / Dream a Little Scream
programme.desc: The gang finds themselves in the middle of a good ol' fashioned show down!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Seven Foot itch / Being McGee
programme.desc: Squirt ressurects his pet lousy from the grave.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Trouble In Spit Creek / The Spy Who Squatched Me
programme.desc: During a game of Stink Toss, McGee and Buttsquat get lost in the forest for what feels like days!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT World Championship
programme.desc: Season IX comes to an end with the prestigious WPT World Championship from Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part I
programme.desc: After being charged with crimes he didn't commit, Jack Atlas scrambles to uncover the truth before his friends and fans turn their back on him for good.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Will The Real Jack Atlas, Please Stand Up: Part II
programme.desc: With Jack Atlas on the run, Yusei and Crow set out in search of their pal, hoping to clear his good name before bad turns to worse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: When Zora's stubborn son Leon suddenly returns home, Crow picks a duel with him to help him realize that the ongoing quarrel he has with his mother is much ado about nothing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duelist For Hire
programme.desc: When Yusei heads to a tumbleweed town at the request of some locals, he quickly finds himself in the middle of two feuding families - with his old friend Kalin right there with him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part I
programme.desc: When Yusei challenges Kalin to a duel, he hopes to save his old acquaintance from a terrible fate. However, the dueling gets dicey when it becomes clear that Kalin doesn't necessarily want to be saved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part II
programme.desc: As Yusei continues to duel his best to save Kalin from a most unhappy ending, he suddenly finds himself double crossed by his supposed allies and in desperate need of some saving of his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part I
programme.desc: After being double crossed and sent to the mines by his supposed allies, Yusei hatches a plan to escape. Can Yusei find a way out, or will he and Kalin be forced to work the mines forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part II
programme.desc: It's a high-speed minecart chase as Kalin and Yusei scramble to rescue Sergio's family from the clutches of the Crash Town mine. When Lawton and his goons gain up on the fleeing family, things take a heartbreaking turn.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part I
programme.desc: The sinister Lawton has captured West and Nico and gained control of Crash Town, but Yusei and Kalin have no intention of letting him get away with it. It's the ultimate showdown as the dueling duo confront Lawton in a winner-takes-all battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part II
programme.desc: As the clash between Lawton, Yusei and Kalin comes to a climactic close, Yusei and Kalin must figure out a way to defeat Lawton before his deck destroys their dreams of freeing everyone in the mines.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Question of the Card
programme.desc: When Sherry breaks into a city building in search of answers about a very special duel card, she finds a lot more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical, musical message for Po. The Teletubbies watch two children whose father is a lighthouse keeper, and learn that lighthouses have lots of steps.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy with his grandad’s pigeons. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies go out to play. They play on the hills spinning around and waving their arms.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has a batch of Doves delivered, to use in his magic act, and asks Bob to build a dovecote for his new birds to live in. Mr Ellis realises that he has to go to work but does not want to leave the birds at home alone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor. He asks Muck to collect some special tiles from JJ, explaining that they are very fragile and easy to break.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old hand Thomas Plant and newbie Mark Hales take to the road, going head-to-head as they try and out-buy and out-sell each other. They start their journey in Portrush, Northern Ireland and end up for an auction in Belfast.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Real Twin Peaks & UD, Update: Baby Broker, Twins, Mary and Martha & UD and Serial Child Molester & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Resurrection Mary, UD: Who Saved My Life?, Little Girl Lost, Victor Gerena & UD and Viet Pilot's Daughter & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Fatima
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatima (Pts. 1, 2 & 3), Log Cabin Fraud & UD, UD: If the Truth Be Known and Missing Cheek.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Creeped out
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team investigate a fascinating location, with a very varied history. Original AYH team member Tim rejoins the gang for the night, and everyone seems to be uneasy and on edge...but why?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: This doesn’t seem real!
programme.desc: Whilst investigating a very old and historical building, the AYH team encounter mysterious footsteps, unexplained taps and other noises seemingly on request. But at which one of the three venues on offer is this paranormal activity taking place?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I can't rationlise it!!
programme.desc: In this episode, Phil and Sara get the shock of their lives, Ben braves two lone vigils and Dale is unnerved by unexplained noises. But which venue do the team choose to investigate?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Someone watching
programme.desc: In this episode the team investigate a building where a phantom soldier has been seen. Reports also include poltergeist activity, a spectral child, and a malevolent entity. And one team member ends up needing medical attention…but who?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: The World's End
programme.desc: In this season finale, the team return to a venue which sees Jane and Dale witness a very strange incident. Phil and Ben are plagued by phantom footsteps, along with Sara and Jane. And Dale gets the shock of his life. But which venue is it?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Now You See Me
programme.desc: 26-year-old deaf woman Alexa Cullen vanished from her home in Manaia, on the Coromandel Peninsular in 1995. She had a history of hitch-hiking and police suspected she’d run away. But three years later, ominous rumors began circulating in the community.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Betsy Ross House
programme.desc: A family living in a Revolutionary War era house in Pennsylvania fears for their child and urgently calls on the TAPS team for help.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Star Island
programme.desc: The TAPS team braves the wintery waters of the Atlantic to investigate Star Island off of the coast of Portsmouth, NH.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Edith Wharton Estate
programme.desc: TAPS is the first team to investigate The Mount in Lenox, MA, the astounding estate of famous author Edith Wharton.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2
programme.desc: Watch the second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation of a historic hall, where the paranormal activity includes the disembodied sounds of children laughing and crying and the apparition of a white lady.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Spring has dawned and the birds have arrived, but a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear's house. Masha is obviously more than happy to look after him, making him her new pet.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has made a new purchase: he has bought a brand new motorcycle. Now, as a cool biker, he plans on impressing She-Bear, but she does not seem to like him or his motorcycle very much.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of the ripe, appetising acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, and the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favourite team. However, Masha gets bored while waiting for a goal so she goes outside looking for one.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The wolves are going to cook borscht under Masha's guidance. They have a cookbook, a big pot and a ravenous appetite. But they still have to get the ingredients. It seems that the newly-minted culinary specialists will get something interesting.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's old circus friend Tiger comes over for a visit because there is nothing more wonderful than passionately play chess with your best friend. But Masha has her own idea of a good time.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When Masha and Penguin enjoy a new game together, the pair go on a fun-filled adventure that sees them travel to Mars before heading out to the open sea to visit the Frog Princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha becomes a personal trainer to a group of bees who are eating too many sweets.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A professional gunfighter is hired to kill a Dodge City businessman, now courting the gunfighter's former wife.

programme.desc: Fear of a plague spreads in Dodge City when a private rail coach is quarantined because of a case of spotted fever on board.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks) encounter a world where a master manipulator seemingly has created robots to replace human beings.
